headline: Trade Tracker: Kevin Simpson buys Intuit, Palo Alto and more Caterpillar
summary: Kevin Simpson, Capital Wealth Planning founder and CIO, joins CNBC's "Halftime Report" to detail his latest portfolio moves.

headline: Dividend stocks are catching up to tech stocks on a key earnings metric at a critical time for the market
summary: Dividend stocks are closing the earnings growth gap with tech stocks, a reason for investors seeking safety in a volatile market to favor income opportunities.

headline: Dow Jones Futures Rise, Oil Prices Retreat; Dell, Micron Lead 7 Stocks To Watch
summary: Oil prices surged to their highest close since 2022, sending the major indexes tumbling. Dell and Micron are among stocks worth watching.

headline: Atlas Energy’s US$840 Million Power Deal Could Be A Game Changer For Caterpillar (CAT)
summary: Earlier this week, Atlas Energy Solutions announced a Global Framework Agreement with Caterpillar covering about 1.4 gigawatts of natural-gas power generation capacity and roughly US$840,000,000 in purchase commitments for generator sets to be delivered between 2027 and 2029. This multiyear contract highlights Caterpillar’s growing role in supplying behind-the-meter and bridge power solutions for rising electricity demand tied to data centers and electrification. We’ll now examine how this...
